title: BUbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Dispute over Cardi B's Super Bowl cameo roils prediction markets
items.description: Cardi B appeared during Bad Bunny's halftime show at the Super Bowl, but one prediction market says it's unclear whether she sang.

items.title: Lawyers of Chicago woman shot by federal agents say documents show how DHS lies about investigations
A new tax break on auto loan interest may help 4 million car owners
items.description: New deduction allows taxpayers to deduct up to $10,000 on interest they paid to buy a new American-made vehicle in 2025.

items.title: Pentagon-FAA dispute over lasers to thwart cartel drones led to airspace closure, AP sources say
items.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for “special security reasons.”

items.title: WATCH:  'Dawson's Creek' star James Van Der Beek dies at age 48
items.description: James Van Der Beek, the actor best known for starring in the teen TV drama "Dawson's Creek" and films including "Varsity Blues," has died. He was 48.

items.title: Man questioned in Guthrie disappearance speaks out, says experience was 'terrifying'
items.description: The man who was questioned and released in the investigation into Nancy Guthrie's disappearance said the experience was 'terrifying.'

items.title: 'Dawson's Creek' star James Van Der Beek dies at age 48
items.description: Actor James Van Der Beek of “Dawson’s Creek” and “Varsity Blues fame has died at age 48.

items.title: Breezy Johnson has plans for her repaired gold medal
items.description: Team USA star skier Breezy Johnson talks with CBS News about her broken Olympic medal, a superstition, and what keeps her motivated on the slopes.
